epigraph.quote: It was a really pretty walk down to the town beside the river.

moments.quote: "The Hills" by John Ireland sounded beautiful, & a Zulu song & "Zadok the Priest".
We crawled off at Bristol & called in to see Robert & Joan & Naomi.

moments.place: Hook Farm Campsite, Uplyme, Devon, UK
moments.quote: Tonic snapped his lead running away from fireworks.
